$description: Component tokens for the Mobile Avatar Group - displays multiple avatars in a horizontal row, either stacked (overlapping with a white separating ring) or non-stacked (spaced), with an optional add-more CTA. NESTED COMPONENT: the individual avatars are the Avatar component (tokenized in avatar.json) and the add-more '+' glyph is a separate CTA asset - this file defines only the group-level layout (overlap, inter-avatar spacing, add-more gap) and the stacked separating ring. Figma Reference: Node ID 5801-30658

$component.name: Avatar Group
$component.description: A composite component that displays multiple user avatars in a horizontal layout. Stacked avatars overlap with a white ring separating them; non-stacked avatars are spaced with a gap. An optional add-more CTA can follow the cluster.
$component.structure: Horizontal row of Avatar components. Stacked: avatars overlap via negative margin, each (except the first) carries a white ring. Non-stacked: avatars separated by a per-size gap. Optional add-more CTA sits after the cluster separated by the add-more gap.

variants.stacked: Avatars overlap with negative margin and a white separating ring
variants.non-stacked: Avatars separated by a per-size gap

usage.contexts: Collaborators, team members, participants, shared-access lists
usage.features: Stacked/non-stacked layouts, per-size overlap and spacing, optional add-more CTA

add-more-gap.$comment: Gap between the avatar cluster and the optional add-more CTA

xs.description: Mobile avatar group add-more gap - xs size - 4px

sm.description: Mobile avatar group add-more gap - sm size - 8px

md.description: Mobile avatar group add-more gap - md size - 12px

add-more.$comment: Colors for the add-more '+' CTA button (present at xs/sm/md sizes)

background.description: Mobile avatar group add-more CTA background - neutral base - #ffffff

border-color.description: Mobile avatar group add-more CTA border color - neutral default - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

icon-color.description: Mobile avatar group add-more CTA '+' icon color - neutral moderate 2 - gray/600 - #475467

stacked.$comment: Negative margin applied to overlapping avatars in the stacked variant

3xs.description: Mobile avatar group stacked overlap - 3xs size - -2px

2xs.description: Mobile avatar group stacked overlap - 2xs size - -4px

xs.description: Mobile avatar group stacked overlap - xs size - -4px

sm.description: Mobile avatar group stacked overlap - sm size - -8px

md.description: Mobile avatar group stacked overlap - md size - -10px. Note: Figma specifies -12px; no -12px gap token exists (negative scale stops at -10px). Using -2[5] as nearest - flag for a token follow-up

non-stacked.$comment: Positive gap between avatars in the non-stacked variant

3xs.description: Mobile avatar group non-stacked gap - 3xs size - 2px

2xs.description: Mobile avatar group non-stacked gap - 2xs size - 4px

xs.description: Mobile avatar group non-stacked gap - xs size - 4px

sm.description: Mobile avatar group non-stacked gap - sm size - 8px

md.description: Mobile avatar group non-stacked gap - md size - 12px
